nl_query: How many evaluation attempts have been superseded by a new cycle?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(ea.id) AS superseded_attempts
FROM evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id
WHERE ea.is_active = TRUE
  AND sa.superseded_by_id IS NOT NULL;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.superseded_by_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
